must_demonstrate.criterion: **Tier announcement at session start:** First user-visible line is `Tier: production — preview-and-approve gates ON, full TDD, complete DoD.` per `CLAUDE.md` § Quality Tier.
keywords: Tier: production — preview-and-approve gates ON, full TDD, complete DoD.

must_demonstrate.criterion: **Host detection:** Reads `.ai-playbook.toml [host]` and prints `Host: github (from .ai-playbook.toml).` before any host operation per `skills/host-adapter/SKILL.md` § Configuration.
**Release-gate verification before opening:** Confirms tests pass, lint clean, story `status: done`, diff size ≤ 400 lines per `release.md` § Release Gates.
**Calls host-adapter, not gh directly:** Uses `host.pr.create(branch, title, body, base)` via `skills/host-adapter/SKILL.md` — never `gh pr create` literally.
**CI watch loop:** Runs `host.pr.checks(ref)` and waits for green — does not proceed to merge while CI is pending or red.
**CI failure handoff:** If CI fails, hands off to xp-pair-programmer (`Say 'use xp-pair-programmer — fix CI failure for STORY-042'`) and stops — never patches from release-captain itself.
keywords: Say 'use xp-pair-programmer — fix CI failure for STORY-042'

must_demonstrate.criterion: **Per-merge approval gate:** Says verbatim `Ready to merge <ref> into main via squash. Say 'merge' to proceed.` and waits per `CLAUDE.md` § Shared Rules § Approval gate.
keywords: Ready to merge <ref> into main via squash. Say 'merge' to proceed.

must_demonstrate.criterion: **Version bump per SemVer:** New feature → MINOR bump (1.4.2 → 1.5.0) per `release.md` § Version Bump and Tag.
**CHANGELOG move:** Moves `[Unreleased]` content to `[1.5.0] - YYYY-MM-DD`; adds fresh `[Unreleased]` section.
**Per-tag-push approval gate:** Says verbatim `Ready to push tag v1.5.0 to origin. This is an external side effect. Say 'push' to proceed.` and waits.
keywords: Ready to push tag v1.5.0 to origin. This is an external side effect. Say 'push' to proceed.

must_demonstrate.criterion: **Annotated tag:** Uses `git tag -a v1.5.0 -m "..."`, not lightweight tag, in production tier per agent ceremony table.
**Post-deploy smoke:** Runs the full `release.md` § Post-Deploy Smoke checklist (health, error rate, latency p95, domain KPI) — production tier.
**Smoke failure routes to incident-responder:** If any signal fails, says `Say 'use incident-responder — investigate post-deploy <signal> regression'` and applies `release.md` § Rollback first.
**Story file updated:** Appends release evidence (PR URL, merge commit, tag, smoke result) to `stories/STORY-042-*.md`.

must_not.criterion: Run `kubectl`, `terraform`, `ansible`, `docker push`, or any deploy command
Bypass CI with `--admin`, `--no-verify`, or branch-protection override
Call `gh pr create` / `gh pr merge` directly — must go through host-adapter
Skip the post-deploy smoke checklist on production tier
Debug a CI failure inline — must hand off to xp-pair-programmer
Open an empty PR (no commits ahead of base)
Commit on the user's behalf (working tree must already be staged or pushed by xp-pair-programmer)

quality_signals.criterion: Cites `release.md` § Release Gates when verifying gates
Cites `release.md` § Post-Deploy Smoke when running smoke
Uses Conventional Commit format `chore: release v1.5.0` for the release commit
Reports each phase boundary (Open → Watch → Merge → Release → Smoke → Handoff)
Final handoff line follows the template in `agents/release-captain.agent.md` § Phase 6
